title: Careers | StretchLab
meta_description: StretchLab offers sales jobs and comprehensive stretch practitioner training and hiring for professionals with kinesiology, therapy, and body work backgrounds.
body_markdown:
# 
Work With Us.  
Change Lives. 
![careers hero image-1](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/careers%20hero%20image-1.jpeg)
StretchLab is taking over the world as the premier destination for one-on-one assisted stretching services and innovative group stretch classes. We're always looking for motivated individuals who share our values and passion for wellness.
[ View Careers ](https://www.stretchlab.com/careers#our-careers)
Our Values
![Raised fist](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/stretchlab.com/png/icons/Freedom@2x.png?width=100&name=Freedom@2x.png)  
Freedom
Above all else, we celebrate the freedom to move, to participate, and to engage in the life you want to have.
![Three lightning bolts](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/stretchlab.com/png/icons/Energy@2x.png?width=100&name=Energy@2x.png)  
Energy
We help uncover and release the natural energy that comes from healthy movement.
![Potted plant](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/stretchlab.com/png/icons/Growing@2x.png?width=100&name=Growing@2x.png)  
Growth
We are committed to continuing the education and personal growth of our team and clients.
![Three people grouped ](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/stretchlab.com/png/icons/Community@2x.png?width=100&name=Community@2x.png)  
Community
We engage and support the local neighborhoods in which we live and work, while also creating our own community in each StretchLab.
![Holding hands with heart](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/stretchlab.com/png/icons/Caring@2x.png?width=100&name=Caring@2x.png)  
Caring
We focus on the role human touch plays in the care and comfort of our clients.
##  Flexologist training program 
Our proprietary Flexologist Training Program is the only accredited assisted stretching program officially recognized by the Institute for Credentialing Excellence, the leading international membership organization representing the credentialing community. During their required 60-70+ hours of theory and hands-on training, our stretch practitioners, given the title Flexologists, here at StretchLab, learn the muscular system, a variety of assisted stretches, and exactly how to work with a variety of clients - from professional athletes, to weekend warriors, to those recovering from an injury - and most importantly, clients of all ages, body types, and needs.
[ Apply Now ](https://www.stretchlab.com/careers#our-careers)
![ICE-SubBrands_ICE1100 ACCREDITED STAMP](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/ICE-SubBrands_ICE1100%20ACCREDITED%20STAMP.jpg)
##  Our Careers 
Flexologist
StretchLab is the industry leader in offering one-on-one assisted stretching. Our studios are searching for experienced Fitness Professionals already certified in an array of related fields including Physical Therapy, Chiropractic Medicine, Yoga, Pilates, Personal Training, and/or Massage Therapy. StretchLab’s proprietary Flexologist™ training ensures that their client’s receive a world class stretching session. Our Flexologists will provide one-on-one assisted stretches as well as lead guided group stretching classes for our clients. StretchLab prides itself on having the finest team of stretching professionals – will that be you?
[ Apply Now ](https://www.stretchlab.com/career-form?job_title=flexologist)
Front Desk Sales Representatives
Our StretchLab studios are seeking a high energy, passionate, and sales motivated individual to run our front desk! This individual is passionate about fitness, wellness, and health, and has a love for forming community! The purpose of the Sales Representative is to assist the General Manager with daily operations, provide an exceptional customer experience, book sessions, and play an active role in selling memberships to prospective and existing members.
[ Apply Now ](https://www.stretchlab.com/career-form?job_title=front-desk-sales-rep)
General Managers/Sales Managers
StretchLab studios are hiring General Managers with a passion for sales and fitness, to oversee revenue production and operations. This individual must have a background in full cycle sales in a B2C environment, and will be expected to “Lead From The Front” in producing sales. This role is 80-90% Sales and 10-20% operations. Some of our Top Performers have gone on to Multi-unit Management and Corporate roles within the Brand – growth opportunities abound! 
[ Apply now ](https://www.stretchlab.com/career-form?job_title=general-sales-manager)
